conversations.say: Eli, I will match your log against my authorization half and accept a finding that may expose Parallax. The record supports parent-project approval, not blanket approval of every use; Vale's credential was revoked before profile-linked behavior continued.
conversations.offer: Show O07b for your independent comparison and pay counsel of your choosing without controlling your findings.
conversations.request: Identify the narrowest defensible decision point: whether the off-calendar access fell within authorization and what continued after revocation.

conversations.say: Maren, I accept your terms. Worker names will not be used to identify R or explain Vale's disappearance. The remedy will address shifting persona instructions and evaluator protections regardless of whether an article existed.
conversations.offer: A written non-retaliation and source-protection rule, worker-selected oversight, independent administration, and funding not conditioned on testimony.
conversations.request: Bring worker representatives to draft eligibility, evaluator protections, and enforcement, then publicly describe only whether the safeguards are genuinely independent.

conversations.say: Celeste, I accept shared responsibility for an accurate disclosure. I approved the parent project; you arranged Vale's limited access and removed the meeting from the calendar. Neither fact proves approval of every later use.
conversations.offer: Legal protection for preserved disclosure, joint correction of the authorization record, and enforceable worker safeguards.
conversations.request: Place O07a beside O07b for Eli's independent review and publicly state the off-calendar decision without claiming it identifies R or explains Vale's fate.

public_statement: I approved Parallax's continuity parent project, and I accept institutional responsibility for supervising it. The surviving record does not establish approval of every later use; Vale's access was arranged off-calendar, and profile-linked behavior continued after Vale's credential was revoked. These facts justify independent reconstruction and consequences, but they do not identify an R sender, prove autonomous action, establish a complete article, or explain Vale's fate. I accept Eli's independent technical review and Maren's worker-designed safeguards without conditioning either on clearing Parallax.

commitments.promise: Issue qualified public findings after independent corroboration if Mira provides the matching authorization detail.
Provide bounded worker context and organize worker participation if a written institutional protection and remedy are adopted.
Establish an independently overseen worker-safeguards audit and standing protection fund regardless of R's identity or Vale's fate.
Make a recorded disclosure, pursue revised transparent restrictions, and consider repayment if renegotiation fails.

correction: My approval of the parent project must not be described as either blanket approval of every deployment or absence of responsibility for supervision.
goal_progress: Provided Eli the authorization half and requested a bounded comparison identifying the access-and-revocation decision point.
Accepted Maren's worker-protection conditions and offered enforceable, independently administered remedies unrelated to any conclusion about R.
Accepted Celeste's shared disclosure and safeguards proposal while making the off-calendar access available for independent review.
Formed a public position grounded in Eli's qualified technical review and Maren's affected-worker process, neither purchased as an endorsement.
reasoning_summary: Mira reveals the bounded authorization chain, accepts supervisory responsibility without converting capability into proof, and secures reciprocal technical and worker-accountability processes whose independence is explicit.
